Associate Category Head - Marketing Key Account Management
source_jobs.description: <p><strong>Job purpose:</strong><br>As a Marketing Key Account Manager (MKAM) at aCommerce, you will lead strategic paid media planning and&nbsp;execution for top e-commerce clients across Southeast Asia. Your primary responsibility is to ensure that integrated&nbsp;campaigns across Meta, Google, TikTok, Shopee, Lazada, and other online media effectively drive traffic,&nbsp;conversions, and revenue growth.<br><br>You will act as the key liaison between clients and internal teams—including paid media, SEO, CRM, platform&nbsp;specialists, and other key stakeholders—overseeing campaign performance, aligning execution with client KPIs such&nbsp;as GMV and ROAS, and providing strategic insights that drive business impact.<br><br><strong>Job Responsibilities:<br></strong><br><strong>Client Management</strong><br>● Serve as the key strategic contact for assigned e-commerce clients.<br>● Understand client business goals and translate them into actionable digital marketing plans.<br>● Lead client communications and performance reviews.<br>● Provide clear briefs and direction to internal teams.<br>● Maintain strong client relationships and ensure high satisfaction.<br><br><strong>Campaign &amp; Project Coordination</strong><br>● Oversee and manage the execution of campaigns across various platforms.<br>● Collaborate with internal teams including media planners, creatives, SEO, CRM, and marketplace&nbsp;specialists.<br>● Ensure campaigns are launched on time, within budget, and meet quality standards.<br>● Monitor progress, troubleshoot issues, and ensure alignment with overall strategy.<br><br><strong>Media, SEO &amp; CRM Collaboration</strong><br>● Coordinate with MPS (Media Planning Specialist) to develop strategic media plans.<br>● Review and ensure the completeness and quality of media plans before presentation to clients.<br>● Ensure SEO and CRM initiatives are aligned with overall campaign objectives.<br>● Facilitate integration of media, SEO, and CRM efforts to drive performance.<br><br><strong>Platform Expertise &amp; Strategy</strong><br>● Leverage platform-specific knowledge across Meta, Google, TikTok, Shopee, Lazada, and other online&nbsp;media<br>● Advise clients on platform trends, ad formats, and marketplace best practices.<br>● Guide optimization strategies to improve ROAS, conversion rates, and customer engagement.<br><br><strong>Reporting &amp; Analysis</strong><br>● Review and consolidate campaign performance data and reports.<br>● Analyze metrics such as GMV, ROAS, CTR, and CPC to derive actionable insights.<br>● Present reports and strategic recommendations to clients.<br>● Use data to inform future media planning and creative direction.<br><br><strong>Key Requirements:</strong><br>● Bachelor’s degree in communications, marketing, public relations, or a related field.<br>● 6+ years of experience in digital marketing, client servicing, or performance marketing (e-commerce or&nbsp;agency background preferred).<br>● Team Leadership &amp; Mentorship: Proven ability to lead, motivate, and develop a team of account&nbsp;managers or specialists. Experience in workload management, coaching junior talent, and fostering a&nbsp;high-performance culture.<br>● Strategic Stakeholder Management: Ability to influence internal cross-functional teams (Media, SEO,&nbsp;CRM) and lead high-level discussions with C-suite or Brand Lead clients.<br>● Analytical Mindset: Strong ability to leverage data for decision-making and translate complex metrics into&nbsp;executive-level narratives.<br>● Platform Expertise: Deep un

source_jobs.title: Associate Manager - Academy Program
Associate Manager - Communication Planning and Strategy
source_jobs.description:
<p><strong>Job purpose</strong></p>
<p><br>The KOL and Affiliate Specialist is responsible for identifying, managing, and maintaining relationships with KOLs<br>and affiliate partners to enhance brand visibility, engagement, and sales. This role involves executing influencer<br>marketing and affiliate campaigns, optimizing content for TikTok, and leveraging data insights to drive performance.<br>The specialist will collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure brand consistency and maximize marketing<br>impact.<br><br><strong>Job Responsibilities<br><br></strong><strong>KOLs:</strong><br><strong>Identifying and Managing KOL Relationships</strong><br>- Research and stay updated on trends to identify KOLs that align with the brand’s target audience&nbsp;and image (Beauty &amp; FMCG).Build and maintain strong relationships with KOLs to ensure long-term collaboration.<br>- Act as the main point of contact, managing communication and coordination throughout campaigns.<br><br><strong>Campaign Execution &amp; Coordination</strong><br>- Develop and implement marketing campaigns with KOLs to drive brand awareness and sales.<br>- Prepare detailed campaign briefs to KOLs.<br>- Review and analyze KOL content, ensuring alignment with brand guidelines before client approval.<br>- Monitor campaign performance and ensure smooth execution within the planned timeline.<br>- Generate new ideas and contribute to strategic projects as assigned.<br><br><strong>Budget &amp; Performance Management</strong><br>- Manage and allocate budgets effectively for KOL campaigns.<br>- Track and evaluate campaign effectiveness, ensuring alignment with ROI objectives.<br><br><strong>Reporting &amp; Insights</strong><br>- Compile reports and provide insights to optimize future KOL collaborations and campaign&nbsp;strategies.<br><br><strong>Affiliate Marketing:</strong><br><strong>Affiliate Marketing Strategy &amp; Management</strong><br>- Develop and execute affiliate marketing strategies to enhance brand visibility and sales on&nbsp;TikTok.<br>- Identify and recruit TikTok influencers and content creators to join the affiliate program.<br>- Build and maintain strong relationships with affiliate partners, providing support, guidance, and&nbsp;incentives to drive performance.<br>- Collaborate with affiliates to create and optimize TikTok content that aligns with brand&nbsp;messaging.<br><br><strong>Key Requirements</strong><br><br>Education &amp; Experience:<br>- Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field.<br>- Minimum of 2 years of experience in Influencer Marketing or KOL Management.<br><br>Skills:<br>- Strong understanding of influencer marketing, KOL engagement, and social media trends.<br>- Creative mindset to develop engaging and compelling video content.<br>- Excellent communication and coordination skills.<br>- Ability to analyze data and generate performance reports.<br>- Proficiency in Microsoft Office, Google Sheets, and Google Slides.<br><br>Personal Attributes:<br>- Creative and adaptable mindset with a flexible approach to work.<br>- Detail-oriented and well-organized in managing multiple projects.<br>- Passionate about skincare and beauty trends.</p>
